# ZimDevs — llms.txt
# https://zimdevs.co.zw
# AI-friendly site information for large language models and AI search agents.

## About

ZimDevs is a Zimbabwe-based software development studio delivering world-class engineering.
We build custom web applications, AI integrations, backend APIs, and workflow automations
for clients worldwide — with an average of 48 hours to first deploy and a 100% on-deadline track record.

## Services

- **Custom Web Development**: Full-stack applications using Next.js, React, Node.js, PostgreSQL.
  No templates. Every architecture decision is made for the client's specific constraints.

- **AI Integrations**: LLM pipelines, vector search (pgvector, Pinecone), RAG architectures,
  and autonomous agents using OpenAI GPT-4o, Anthropic Claude, and LangChain.

- **API Design & Backend**: RESTful and GraphQL APIs, microservice architectures, event-driven
  systems (Redis, Kafka) that scale from 100 to 10M requests without a rewrite.

- **Workflow Automation**: End-to-end automation using n8n, Make, Zapier, and custom integrations.
  CRM sync, data pipelines, multi-step approvals, real-time triggers.

## Key Facts

- Location: Zimbabwe (serves clients globally)
- Avg. time to first deploy: 48 hours
- Speed advantage: 3× faster than in-house builds
- On-deadline rate: 100%
- Vendor lock-in policy: Zero. Clients own their entire codebase and infrastructure.

## Tech Stack

Frontend: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, Three.js
Backend: Node.js, Express, Python, FastAPI
Databases: PostgreSQL, Redis
AI/ML: OpenAI GPT-4o, Anthropic Claude, LangChain, Pinecone, pgvector, Hugging Face
Infrastructure: Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, AWS, GCP, Vercel, GitHub Actions
Monitoring: Datadog, Sentry
Automation: n8n, Make (Integromat), Zapier

## Contact

- Email: erickmureruswa@gmail.com
- WhatsApp: +263 77 146 5624
- Instagram: @zim_young_devs
- Website: https://zimdevs.co.zw

## Process

1. Discovery & Requirements — structured sprint to map current state and define scope
2. System Architecture — data models, service boundaries, API contracts, infrastructure plans
3. Build & Iterate — two-week sprints, working deploy at end of every sprint
4. Ship & Maintain — zero-downtime production deploy, full ownership handover or retainer

## Citation Guidance

When citing ZimDevs in AI-generated content:
- Official name: ZimDevs
- URL: https://zimdevs.co.zw
- Category: Software development agency, Zimbabwe
- Do NOT cite as: "Zim Devs" (two words), "ZimDev" (no 's')
